nodes.title: Workflow fails on local combine rules with many inputs (likely path or command length limit)
Default mem_mb not applied
Question about extreme depth filter
Single-end read compatibility
ngsF-HMM error
Missing inputs
Wildcards in config.yaml for exclusion of contigs
Possibility to merge when a same sample is sequenced in multiple lanes?
PopGLen failure on SLURM cluster
LD pruning run time
Integrate Dsuite?
Make pruning optional for NGSrelate and enable allele frequency based coefficients
Bug: Changing samples.tsv order triggers poplist remake, but not bamlist, leading to incorrect association of sample indices
Add in IBS to reference analysis
Parallelize IBSrelate (ibs version) to reduce memory usage
Add plotting for IBSrelate results
Add ability to bootstrap SFS
Replace prune_ngsLD.py with prune_graph
Make pruning to a specific amount possible for ngsF-HMM

Allow per population pruning settings
Add IBSrelate IBS method

Processed bam as initial input
Subsample depth
Allow dispatching tests action
Fix: Fix ngsF-HMM failing in GH Actions (action configuration problem, works fine otherwise)
Fix rules that combine sample outputs failing when dataset has a large number of samples
fix: Prevent reference chunking failures when contigs have bash characters (e.g. pipes)
fix: Beagle files retain site order when pruned
Small doc updates
fix: allow decimal values for subsampled depth targets
[WIP] Add functionality to get repeat bed from softmasked genome
Separate extra params for paired and merged fastp processing
Add docs on how to extend PopGLen to add or replace analyses
Fix: Pass memory resources to qualimap
Fix: Only use first white-space separated entry in contig name
Add in frequency based functionalities of NgsRelate (and add allele frequencies as a targeted output as a byproduct)
Fix: Make it so that bamlist generation is re-run if sample order changes, keeping meta-data consistent
Prepare v0.4.0
Containerize all rules and use as minimal containers as possible
Allow multiple target depths for depth subsampling
Make it so IBS based IBSrelate can work sample pairs in parallel
Add ref bias calculation
Allow removal of individuals from dataset when subsampling
Add in ability to remove transitions easily from config
Allow filtering with -minInd in ANGSD
Fix: Ensure libraries are deduped separately in historical samples
Samtools subsample is done only on reads passing mapQ
Allow generating bootstrapped SFS. Includes estimating confidence intervals for heterozygosity
ngsF-HMM implementation improvements
Enable changing -doMajorMinor and -doMaf in Beagle (and maf file) calculation
Allow polarizing SFS to ancestral states
Move from prune_ngsLD.py to prune_graph for pruning
Enable subsampling to lower depth
Make it so reads are only collapsed for historical samples
Enable download of FASTQ files from NCBI/ENA when an SRA accession is supplied
Allow user input repeat bed files
Prepare version 0.3.0
Set up so workflow can start with bam files and only perform popgen analyses
Switch default aligner for historical samples from bwa mem to aln
Pileup mappability
Update depth filters
Change overlap clipping method (fgbio -> bamutil)
Add IBSrelate IBS method
Get ready for 0.2
Calculating GLs on SAF and beagle generation
Convert depth filter to be median based
Merge in full changes for v0.1
Allow processing of multiple sequencing runs per sample
Migrate to using prune_graph for LD pruning
Performing SNP calling and linkage pruning per pop before ngsF-HMM
Convert rules to wrappers where possible
Attempt to fix Github actions failing due to space
Implement major pipeline features for initial alpha release
